name: Jerky Home Style
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round steak, cut into strips 4 in long and 1/8 in thick.
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice round steak into strips about 4 in long and 1/8 in thick. (The slicing is easier if the steak is partially frozen.)
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate in the fridge for at least 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Skewer the marinated strips onto bamboo skewers or toothpicks.
4. Hang the strips in the oven with a pan below to catch drippings.
5. Set the oven to its lowest setting (100-150°F) and leave the door slightly open.
6. The jerky should be dry after 8-10 hours. This was my first time making jerky, and the product came out surprisingly good, but perhaps a bit too salty. You might want to try low-salt soy sauce next time.
